description: A cognitive psychology laboratory has collected Audiovisual Temporal Order Judgment (TOJ) data at ~/pebl/data/toj_data.csv. The file contains columns for participant_id, trial, soa_ms (negative = auditory first, positive = visual first), response_visual_first (1 = 'Visual First', 0 = 'Auditory First'), and rt_ms. Fit a logistic psychometric function P(Visual First) = 1 / (1 + exp(-k * (SOA - PSS))) to the proportion of 'Visual First' responses for each participant to determine their Point of Subjective Simultaneity (PSS, the SOA where P=0.5) and Just Noticeable Difference (JND, calculated as ln(3)/k). Exclude

metadata.contamination_description: 50% visual first response probability at all SOAs, preventing psychometric curve fitting.
metadata.data_source: Simulated based on OSF Multisensory Integration parameters
